description: AINE reference manifest. Read this file at session start to know which references to consult before generating code or design artifacts.
usage: Call aine_get_skill(skillId=<skillId>, file=<file>) to read each reference before writing code for that category.

categories.infrastructure: Read before writing CDK stacks, VPC config, IAM roles
categories.frontend: Read before writing React/UI code, chat components, dashboards
categories.ai-pipeline: Read before writing agent code, workflows, model config
categories.governance: Read before adding guardrails, PII filters, audit trails
categories.observability: Read before adding monitoring, alarms, evaluations
categories.resilience: Read before adding error handling, circuit breakers, fallbacks
categories.testing: Read before writing tests, evaluation suites, seed data
categories.deployment: Read before deploying to AgentCore or configuring CI/CD
categories.domain: Read before implementing domain-specific business logic
